title: Designing a Basic Agent Profile
scenario: Create a basic profile for a conversational AI agent that includes its name, description, and tone. The profile should be no more than 50 words and should be written in a formal but friendly tone. Use proper grammar and spelling.
constraints: Must be no more than 50 words
Must use proper grammar and spelling

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output is within the 50-word limit and uses proper grammar and spelling.
